headline: OpenAI unveils first chip via Broadcom deal
detail: OpenAI is building its own silicon in partnership with Broadcom, signaling massive custom-chip demand ahead. This is directly bullish for AVGO, your largest (and currently underwater) position — watch for a real sustained move, not just a headline spike. It also supports the broader semis thesis in SMH.

headline: Bessent says U.S. GDP can hit 3% this year
detail: The Treasury Secretary projecting a return to 3% growth is a macro green light for risk-on assets, especially growth and tech. This supports your QQQ, SPY, and broadly your chip-heavy book. On margin, a rising macro tide buys you breathing room — but it has to actually materialize.

headline: Defense stocks plummet on Germany warship reports
detail: Rheinmetall dropping 19% is a reminder how fast sentiment shifts on geopolitical headlines. You have no direct defense exposure, but it's a warning that concentrated, momentum-driven names can gap down violently — exactly the risk profile of your book.

headline: Offshore crypto platforms trading SpaceX IPO early
detail: Speculative offshore activity around SPCX underscores how thin and unregulated the price discovery is right now. You own this as a brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited real data — manage it manually and keep size small, especially on margin.
